programme.title: Stolen

The two develop a powerful and inspirational relationship in which they discover truths that take most people a lifetime to learn.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.desc: A CIA operative and his translator flee from special forces in Afghanistan after exposing a covert mission.

programme.title: Air

programme.title: Private Valentine: Blonde & Dangerous
programme.desc: A naive pop singer attempts to win approval from a producer and a studio that think her unsuitable for their upcoming military-themed movie. To prove them wrong and win the role, she enlists in the Army.

programme.title: The Princess And The Marine
programme.desc: A Bahraini princess and an American soldier risk their lives for true love.

programme.title: The Silencers
programme.desc: The first of the series of Secret Agent Matt Helm films, the big cheese of Big O, an organization that wants to sabatoge the American atomic missile system.

programme.title: Tight Spot

programme.title: Jeanne Eagels
programme.desc: Actress Jeanne Eagels' troubled career takes her from Broadway stardom to drinking and drug abuse.

programme.title: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: A couple faces divorce after a wife's plan to teach her unfaithful husband a lesson backfires.

programme.title: Homefront (2013)
programme.desc: Jason Statham, James Franco, Winona Ryder and Kate Bosworth star in this action-packed thriller about how far one man will go to protect his family. Widowed ex-DEA agent Phil Broker retires to a quiet Southern town with his 10-year-old daughter and discovers that the idyllic setting is riddled with drugs and violence. When a riveting chain of events forces him to face off with psychotic local drug lord Gator Bodine, Broker must retaliate using the fearsome skills he hoped to keep in his past.

programme.title: Sisters

programme.title: Black Christmas

programme.desc: A mysterious Russian gunslinger aids a marshal and a sheriff in a standoff with a bloodthirsty outlaw gang known as The Hellhounds who have invaded their small East Texas town.

programme.title: City of Industry
programme.desc: A retired thief swears revenge on the lunatic who murdered his brother and partner, while going on the run with the loot they stole.

programme.title: Traitor
programme.desc: A straight arrow FBI agent heads up the investigation into a dangerous international conspiracy.

programme.title: Our Kind of Traitor
programme.desc: A couple find themselves positioned between the Russian Mafia and the MI6 British Secret Service.

programme.desc: The lives of three NYC police officers are transformed by their involvement in a massive drug operation.

programme.title: The Wide West

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Sins In The Family

programme.desc: Cassie's sister turns up dead at a scandalous underground club.

programme.desc: Chloe becomes enamored with her pastor, Caleb, and falls in love with him.

programme.title: Sins In The Family
programme.desc: Zara's perfect life starts to crumble around her.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is hosting a 90210 themed party and wants to create some classic Beverly Hills appys.

programme.title: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: Mr. Pawsitively Perfect
programme.desc: A marketing designer’s favourite foster dog is adopted by a down on his luck furniture designer.

programme.title: Meet You in Scotland
programme.desc: A Scottish poet mistakes a writer’s identity, forcing her to choose between new love or the truth.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: I'm In Love With A Church Girl
programme.desc: A reformed drug trafficker finds unexpected love with a woman guided by strong faith, testing his resolve to leave his criminal past behind.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: The Moon is in Aquarius
programme.desc: On a starry night lit by an Aquarius full moon, Devante and Liz collide at a house party in San Francisco. The spark is instant-and impossible to ignore. Ditching the crowd, they embark on a spontaneous journey through the city's winding streets, iconic views, and hidden gems. With every laugh and shared secret, their bond deepens. But is this love story bound by time-do they only have until dawn?

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Suga Babies
programme.desc: Follow a gang of femme fatales in the dangerous world of drugs and money in this urban tale of power and wealth. They all want Suga, but it ain't sweet.

programme.title: The Betrayal 3: Neva Ending
programme.desc: Blood is not always thicker than water, and not all friends are as loyal as you think. Four different relationships display love, hurt, and betrayal.

programme.title: The Calling
programme.desc: Tamar has been called to become a minister, and for most, this would be an honorable moment, but for Tamar, it is the worst thing that could happen. Tamar is the daughter of prominent Deacon Jessup, and is a lesbian. Taught that her desires are not that of God, Tamar has suppressed them for the last 16 years and has never dated a woman. When the Future Minister’s Ministry opens for a new class, Tamar finds herself falling for the only other woman in the class.

programme.title: The Exit Row
programme.desc: Sasha Dade is dedicated to her demanding, yet comfortable life as a wife, mother and advertising executive near the nation's capital. Clint Meyers is a top selling real estate agent and investor who projects sensitivity and charisma but harbors a methodical dark side. Their worlds collide when a chance encounter on a traumatic flight leads to a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Breaking Free
programme.desc: When his wife is murdered in their own home, Joe, an undercover cop, spirals out of control with alcohol and substance abuse. When he’s seen by an old girlfriend on the street, she helps him to heal his spirit, along with finding justice for his wife.

programme.title: 500 MPH Storm
programme.desc: A scientist must get his family to safety before a "hypercane" wipes America off the map.

programme.title: Age of Ice
programme.desc: A family vacationing in Egypt battles rapidly freezing temperatures to reach safety before the new Ice Age.

programme.title: Planetquake
programme.desc: A tectonic shift causes a series of ever-escalating earthquakes. Seismologists must stop the catastrophe.

programme.title: The 6th Friend
programme.desc: After their graduation party went wrong, friends reunite - but an uninvited guest brings horror and bloodshed.

programme.title: Bermuda Tentacles
programme.desc: When Air Force One crashes in the Bermuda Triangle, a Navy rescue team awakens a deadly creature.

programme.title: The Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: In the arena of cryptozoology, few creatures have captured the imagination like the Loch Ness Monster. Sightings and stories of this beast of lore go back decades. Also known as Nessie for short, this creature is said to occupy Loch Ness in the Scottish Highlands and is often described as massive and long-necked. Widespread interest and belief in the Monster have increased significantly since it was brought to worldwide attention in 1933. Evidence of its presence is anecdotal, with several disputed photos and sonar examinations, but does the Loch Ness Monster really exist? Follow us as we deep dive into the facts.

programme.title: Dead Mary (Edited Version)
programme.desc: It was supposed to be the perfect weekend away... until they invited a bloodthirsty party crasher!

programme.title: Black Christmas
programme.desc: During their Christmas break, a group of sorority girls are stalked by a stranger.

programme.title: Witchery (Edited Version)
programme.desc: When a storm strands a group on a Massachusetts island where the only dwelling is an old hotel supposedly haunted by the ghost of a former German actress (Knef), the result is the standard horror film as each of the cast is picked off one-by-one.

programme.title: Haunters: The Art Of The Scare
programme.desc: HAUNTERS: The Art Of The Scare is a mind-blowing documentary about how haunted houses for Halloween have spawned a controversial subculture of full-contact terror simulations. Go inside the most notorious extreme haunt in the world and ask yourself - how far is too far?

programme.title: Joe Bob's Ghoultide Get-Together
programme.desc: Not even Santa Claus is safe from the evil that descends on Bailey Downs, a small town that is suddenly plagued with malevolent spirits, zombie elves and Krampus - the anti-Santa Claus.

programme.title: The Last Drive-In with Joe Bob Briggs: Joe Bob's Helloween
programme.desc: A maniacal killer clown stalks a young woman babysitting two teens on Halloween night.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins plays a ventriloquist whose dummy has a murderous mind of its own in this chilling psychological horror film written by legendary Hollywood scribe William Goldman.

programme.title: Party Hard, Die Young
programme.desc: A graduation getaway is grounds for a slasher in this slick teen scream.

programme.title: Monster Party
programme.desc: Three thieves break into a mansion, unaware that they have wandered into a dinner party for killers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Cisco Kid

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Denise Sanchez was awarded a hunt at G2 following our Hunters Extravaganza drawings. Its great to get to spend time on the ranch with new members of TTHA. Denise gets familiar with a giant and learns about new technology while on this hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: From time to time you have moments that will change the way think about something. That is what happened for us while hunting the Scimitar Oryx with Republic Outdoors. Hunting is more than harvesting animals, it’s conservation, and in this story, we learn how a species nearly extinct gets another chance to live.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lonestar Beer. Not only is Troy a great friend he is also a big supporter of Hunters Extravaganza. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Cable is a huge supporter of Texas Hunting and everything Teas Trophy Hunters. We are blessed to spend a few days with hum at the beautiful Saddle Creek Ranch in Brady Texas. Greg has a tight management plan and we are glad we got to enjoy his ranch with him and his team.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: The bond between and parent and child can grow in many ways, but nothing compares to the bond shared when hunting. The annual Father-Son hunt at FE Hill Outfitters has becoming a tradition for Heath and his son Gavin and in 2021, Gavin was able to take his largest buck to date, with his dad Heath behind the camera.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: WE join Bobby Falkenberg as he joins Bret Ferguson from Double T Outfitters. Bobby is an avid outdoorsman, judge, and father of 5. Bret manages 30,000 acres in Ozona TX, the knowledge he has of every inch of this amazing low fence ranch is remarkable. Bobby has an action packed 2 day hunt.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon transforms a Fan Fridge full of leftover ingredients into an impressive Charred Cabbage with Bacon-Yogurt Avocado Sauce and Miso Brown Butter Vinaigrette, proving that humble cabbage deserves far more respect. The hosts discuss miso's surprising versatility, recall beloved childhood restaurants, and debate Eddie Murphy's comedy legacy.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly earns his Gay Soup Diet credentials by making a hearty Chickpea and Ditalini Pasta Soup that he insists is both deeply comforting and genuinely slimming for January. Michael Symon and Carla Hall join in for a lively episode about winter blues, childhood thermostat disputes, and the surprisingly emotional power of a good bowl of soup.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon elevates the humble chicken tender by using a feta brine to infuse the meat with tangy, salty flavor before breading and shallow-frying to golden perfection. He finishes the dish with a bold hot honey sauce made with Calabrian chili, creating an indulgent yet sophisticated take on a crowd-pleasing classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall tackles a Fan Fridge from a viewer in Ohio, transforming ground beef, mashed potatoes, and pantry staples into a warming Shepherd's Pie-inspired casserole layered with sautÈed vegetables and finished with a cheesy potato topping. The hosts weave in a thoughtful conversation about grace, kindness to strangers, and the community spirit of how neighborhoods once raised children together.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon each take a third of the same chocolate sheet cake and decorate it their own way, creating three wildly different showstopping desserts in one episode. Clinton goes peanut butter, Carla goes Black Forest-inspired with sour cherry, and Michael goes coconut ganache ó proving that one bake can launch a thousand creative directions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon take on the ultimate comfort food by each creating their own version of a grilled cheese sandwich, showcasing three distinct styles that range from classic to elevated. Michael leads with a rich and decadent Croque Madame, complete with a homemade mornay sauce, gruyère, ham, and a perfectly cooked egg on top, sharing tips on building flavor and texture through technique. Carla follows with a Southern-inspired twist, hollowing out a brioche bun to stuff it with pimento cheese and tangy chow chow pickles, emphasizing balance and texture in every bite. Clinton rounds things out with a fan-inspired take on a classic grilled cheese, combining American, cheddar, and gruyère cheeses on rye bread, using mayonnaise for an evenly crisp, golden exterior. Throughout the episode, the trio trades stories, jokes, and cooking insights, debating everything from sandwich ratios to restaurant culture. They later shift into a lively “overrated vs. underrated” game, diving into food trends, brunch culture, and even aging, blending humor with candid reflections. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway and appreciation for sponsors, leaving viewers inspired to experiment with their own grilled cheese creations at home.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his beloved Tuscan White Bean Stew with chicken sausage, onions, and celery while welcoming sports broadcaster Marysol Castro ó the first female and Latina PA announcer for the New York Mets ó as a special guest. Bean Week reaches its emotional peak as the hosts discuss baseball basics, recent life milestones, and the deeply satisfying power of a vegetable-forward winter meal.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall makes a warmly spiced Moroccan Apple Crumble with dates, cardamom, and cinnamon, building a simple crumble topping using a foolproof ratio formula and serving it with a dollop of cr√ãme fra√ìche for an elegant finish. The hosts discuss the art of checking doneness by eye rather than timer, date farming in California, and Carla's personal decision to embrace her natural gray hair.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Bean Week with her Black Bean Empanadas, stuffing golden, flaky pastry shells with a richly seasoned black bean filling that proves legumes can be just as craveable as meat. The hosts celebrate the internet's enthusiastic response to Clinton's Bean Week proposal and dive into the week with maximum enthusiasm.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: "Pizza With Maia and Alex Shibutani" - Dave and Chris are joined by two-time Olympic medalists, figure skaters Maia and Alex Shibutani who dropped in to talk about their new children’s book bring mystery gifts from Japan.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: "The Dave Chang Show: Mexico’s Top Five Locations for Mexican Cuisine, Asada Invites, and Taco Madness With Bricia Lopez and Javier Cabral" - This episode begins with an introduction to two very influential figures in Mezcal cuisine and Mexican food culture in the U.S., Mexican American authors Bricia Lopez and Javier Cabral. Oaxacan restaurateur Bricia brought food for Dave and Chris from her Los Angeles restaurant, Guelaguetza. As they enjoy chile relleno and tamale mole, a discussion sparks about proper etiquette when ordering food in a foreign language. Javier, who is the editor-in-chief of L.A. Taco, then shares his advice with the group. Dave asks the coauthors to share their top five locations for food in Mexico, which leads to a discussion that journeys through the beautiful country and its cuisine. Later, they share all of the details of their new book, Asada: The Art of Mexican-Style Grilling. Bricia describes an asada for Dave and Chris and extends an invite along with rules for attendance. The pambazo conversation from last episode continues as the guests taste test Dave’s recommendation for pombazos in L.A. and give their blessing. The conversation wraps with Javier sharing that L.A. Tacos’ Taco Madness 2023 is coming up on May 6.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: "The Dave Chang Show: Tiptoeing Around Tipping, Creating the Best Chef of All Time, and the Restaurant Next Door" - Dave and Chris discuss tipping etiquette, including Chris’s not-at-all-shameful “college bar tip” situation, before giving a rundown on creating the Ultimate Chef, taking multiple elements of being a chef and highlighting the best. Finally, Euno joins the pod to introduce a new game: the Best, Most Essential, Hottest, Sexiest, Crispiest, Juiciest, Must-Try Restaurant Guide, a.k.a. Restaurant Next Door.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Chicken Meatloaf with Creamed Corn and Mashed Potatoes - Chef Keith Corbin joins Chris in the kitchen to put together another easy family-friendly meal: chicken meatloaf with a zesty creamed corn and garlicy, buttery mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Fluffy, Buttery Biscuits for the Kiddos: Let's be clear: These are not the biscuits that chef Joshua Skenes used to serve at his three-Michelin-star restaurant Saison. Have I had those biscuits? Yes. Have I watched Josh make biscuits? Yes. Do I have his recipe in my phone? Maybe. Do I glance at that recipe whenever I set out to make biscuits for my kids? Well, wouldn't you? Jokes aside, Josh's biscuits are world-class, and are a product of not just the recipe, but his products and experience. I'm never gonna get them exactly right, but the ones I make are inspired by his. They're definitely passable and my kids can take them in whichever direction they like. My daughter likes it savory. My son likes them smothered in jam.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Stuffed Cabbage (It's Hiding a Giant Meatball!): Sometimes you just need to wrap a delicious meatball in something that makes you feel like you're giving your kids a vegetable. Maybe your kids will reject the cabbage wrapper and leave for you to snack on, or maybe this is the one time that convinces them that cabbage is amazing? Either way, Chris Ying shows you another go-to recipe that is easy and flexible—seasoned meatballs wrapped in cabbage leaves and cooked in a delicious, tomato-y broth.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Cantonese-Style Steamed Fish with Morgan McGlone: World-class Australian chef Morgan McGlone joins Chris Ying to share his go-to technique for preparing a whole steamed fish—something his son absolutely loves! A lot of people are intimidated by cooking a whole fish, but this is our plea to you to get your kids started on steaming/eating whole fish early in life!

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: An enchanting city, Barcelona is brimming with inspirations left by the greatest of artists. But this charming city has another jewel in its crown - La Boqueria food market. Take a journey through the senses with our lively characters and uncover their gastronomic secrets.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Food markets have a strong tradition in the Netherlands and many citizens count on their long street markets for their fresh food supplies. One of the oldest and most famous markets of the Netherlands is the Albert Cuyp Markt, a street market stretching along the upcoming (and "hip") neighborhood of de Pijp.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Ireland's third-largest city has one of Northern Europe's market gems: The English Market. It supplies high-quality food to affluent English families unlike the Irish market, which no longer exists. The best Irish produce today remains on the island and can be found here.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Perhaps one of the most beautiful and well-organized food market buildings in Europe is the Mercado Central of Valencia. Built on the area where an open-air market stood for centuries, the Valencian style Art Noveau construction is a 'Cathederal of senses'.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Kapani market is situated just behind the Aristotelous square of the city of Thessaloniki, facing the Aegean Sea. Exploring this market is exploring the city and its history: a tasteful mix of Sephardic, Balkan, Turkish, and Greek delights. All can be found in the intricate streets of the market or tasted at the many cafés and tavernas operating there daily.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The market of San Benedetto in Cagliari is the island's belly. It is one of the biggest fresh produce markets in Europe and arguably said to be the biggest fish market in Europe. A paradise for food lovers, where every stall keeper has a story to tell.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia's reinventing Italian classics. Learn to make Lidia's fresh Mozzarella salad not with tomatoes but Celery and walnuts instead. programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks
programme.desc: Volcanoes erupt and geysers explode in this sizzling episode. Take a look at the hottest parks you can visit!

programme.title: Secrets of the National Parks
programme.desc: By foot, shuttle, and horseback, gain access to the scenic and geological wonders of Zion and Bryce Canyon National Parks. In Zion, embark on an ascent of Angel's Landing. In Bryce, climb sheer cliff walls, tube down the Virgin River, and gaze upon thousands of bizarre rock spires known as hoodoos.

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks
programme.desc: With acres of sea lions and thousands of buffalo, national parks host the largest homes to all kinds of critters. Get close to your favorite animal in this episode of Best Parks Ever.

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks
programme.desc: National parks cover all kinds of terrain, including the frozen kind. Take a look at why these snowy conditions are worth all the chills.

programme.title: Inside America's National Parks
programme.desc: Grand Teton National Park is a geological wonder, a hiker's paradise, and an irresistible lure for thrill seekers and wildlife enthusiasts. Climb a sheer cliff wall, raft a raging river, visit an avalanche lab, join a search and rescue team, work a dude ranch, and rough it at posh retreats.

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks
programme.desc: Want to release your inner cowboy? These are the western capitals of the world. From the wild buffalo to the beautiful sunsets, these are the best parks ever to star in your own western.

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks
programme.desc: If you like your nature a little weird, then this is the show for you. See all the freaks of nature in the best parks ever.

programme.title: National Parks Revealed
programme.desc: Meet the people of America's national parks who help preserve our monuments and conserve our park's beauty. They rappel down the towering granite faces of Mount Rushmore, they execute prescribed burns in the Grand Canyon, and they plow the treacherous Going-to-the-Sun Road in Glacier National Park.

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks
programme.desc: Some of the best national parks attract thousands of spectators every day. If you're looking for a place to go where you won't bump elbows, then take a look at these solitary parks.

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks
programme.desc: See where astronauts trained for moon missions and dive miles deep into crystal caves in the best parks that you've never heard of.

programme.title: Secrets of the National Parks
programme.desc: Get "a touch of the tundra" as you take in Denali's stunning scenery through the dome-roofed cars of the Denali Star train, meet sled dogs at the Kennels, and take a discovery hike to experience the untamed wilderness and diverse wildlife much as the first explorers to the region once did.

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks
programme.desc: See Mother Nature at its best. From the highest waterfall to the one of the biggest holes in the world, it's this kind of scenery that will make you stop in your tracks.

The family takes him in as he regains his health, and he falls for their young daughter, Penelope (Gail Russell). As Quirt falls deeper in love and becomes accustomed to the family's peaceful ways, his violent past starts to catch up to him. When he wanders into a town where the local lawman has been killed, he finds callow but eager Ben Owens (Anthony Perkins) temporarily acting as sheriff. Soon Ben, who wants to keep his new position, is looking to Morgan for guidance. Though the bounty hunter has his own issues with law enforcement, he admires Ben's enthusiasm and decides to train him to be an effective sheriff.

programme.title: Bandolero!

But at the last second, the hangman -- Dee's brother, Mace (James Stewart), in disguise -- helps them escape. After kidnapping a rancher's wife (Raquel Welch) and with the vengeful sheriff (George Kennedy) in pursuit, they retreat to an abandoned town. Tired of their desperado life, the brothers consider going straight. But when a gang of bandoleros attacks, their chances at starting over seem dim.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here’s the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here’s the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here’s the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world’s most deadly virus. So here’s the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At Noah’s park, Camira hunts block dino eggs with Super Wings, facing surprises when Golden Girl snatches the prize and the egg escapes! Powered by new pod gear, Camira triumphs, while Jett braves the Sahara to find Latu and a fennec fox.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy jet to Jeju, helping Taehoon’s robot save Grandma’s shellfish from a giant fish, then team up to free it. On Mars, Jett and Marty chase Roy's lost bags, while Jinga dazzles with an out-of-this-world tour.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy join Hazel and Runi in Australia to help animals escape wildfires, then fly to Seoul where tiny Antny enters the Strongest Bug Contest, faces rampaging rivals, and, with Super Wings’ upgrades, helps save the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Marty help wash Maxy the giant plane and calm geysers at Oyunuma Pond, then deliver a Wright Flyer to Braden, sparking a time-hop to the Wright brothers, where teamwork lifts spirits and the Flyer takes flight.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Lucie, and Runi’s friendly contest becomes teamwork when they rescue toys from a Vietnam factory fire. Soon, Jett races to Dino World, freeing stranded friends and reuniting a T-Rex family as quakes rumble. Super Wings deliver!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Noah and the Dino Wings turn hail into fruit seeds, planting a thriving farm with Jett’s help and saving Dino World from a flood. Later, teamwork and a daring rescue inside Supersaurus bring the friends closer as everyone returns home safe.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Sicily, Jett and Curie foil invisibility pranks and stop a wild volcano eruption with Curie’s snow launcher, teaching Renata as chaos turns to learning. Aboard Ned’s ship, Super Electric Suits help them rescue everyone from a junk robot.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While the World Spaceport celebrates Jimbo’s retirement, Jett faces a UFO and Space Monster, piloting World Robot as chaos erupts. The team unites, time freezes, and Jimbo reveals Megamon is an old friend, choosing to stay with everyone.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and the Super Wings liven up Xiang Xiang’s Tanghulu shop, rescuing everyone from a syrupy mess and drawing big crowds. In Dino World, the Dino Wings halt a Dinobase takeover and reunite a wandering pterosaur hatchling with its mom.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Floods and thunder strike Dino World but Trico overcomes his fear to help Jett and the Dino Wings rescue every dino with paper boats and planes. Later Noah and Mom’s dino costume adventure leads to a mix-up with real maiasauras, and families reunite.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Paris, Jett and Curie shrink to save moles from a burst pipe during a wild croquet chase. Later, Jett and Sara help Princess Maribel when magical dress chaos erupts, restoring order so the party sparkles brighter than ever.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On the moon, Jett and Curie outsmart dust storms and shield a spacecraft to help Kajsa ride her new bike. In Mexico’s Baja Desert, Jett and Marty clear boulders so Big Wheel can race again and roll to victory, powered by Super Wings spirit.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Munich, Jett and Marty foil Golden Boy and Girl’s wolf costume prank during Mila’s parade, saving everyone from a river dunk. Later in Singapore, Jett, Traver, and Lien’s robot dogs safely stop runaway giant fireworks, rescuing the festival.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Copenhagen, dinos escape through portals as Jett, Lucie, and Super Wings rescue a brachiosaur and guide everyone home. Across the globe, megabot Super Wings unite to send dinos back through swirling portals, saving the world together.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At a deep-sea base, Super Wings and ocean pals unite to hoist a damaged base after a belt tug-of-war. In Madagascar, Eddie uses comic-book courage to find an elephant bird feather and save his dad in a thrilling cliffside rescue.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver inspire Xinyan with Kung Fu mastery, turning chopsticks into her winning move and calming a tiger. In snowy Norway, Jett and Sara stop runaway snowballs so Princess Hedda’s sleigh race ends in victory and laughter.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A wedding spins into chaos as a giant ring escapes, but Big Wing’s catch saves the day and unveils a joyful bride. Later, Jett and Golden Boy use Cross Combo power to tame a hungry dino plant and rescue Golden Girl and Runi.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Loco Nuts - Funny Cartoon Show for Kids
programme.desc: Enjoy the best cartoon show for kids, watch the funny Loco Nuts characters as they have fun & play in the most popular videos for toddlers. Laugh along to these funny videos for children which teach friendship, teamwork & much more.

programme.title: Woofees Funny Cartoon Show & Kids Videos

programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia discovers that the watch she received from her friend is actually a monitoring device for the Robotnik Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Apple Dumplin' wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin's just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling "Tall Tales." So Apple tells her thrilling adventure of a wild road rally she entered, only to surprise the girls by proving the story is actually true.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: When Strawberry & her friends decide to put on a talent show, they plan to enter themselves as a band, The Strawberry Jams!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's winter and the pond's frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate! They decide to showcase their talents at an Ice Dance Show. But just then, a new kid named Apricot shows up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: As Strawberry & Friends visit a Career Fair, they ponder their own futures. They all have thoughts on the jobs they would like: teacher, firefighter, doctor, etc. Strawberry suggests they give these jobs a try, right now - they will pretend they are grown-ups.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything "just so" - and when things don't go her way, she's a pretty bad sport... until Strawberry & Apple Dumplin' help her become the berry best of sports.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.desc: The Bear Family visits the mall. Sister has to decide what to write about for a project.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Papa wants to remove an old tree stump. Then, Brother joins an art class.

programme.desc: The Bear Family gets new neighbors. Then, Papa Bear decides to run for Mayor himself!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. When Nick expresses his concern about being the smallest among the kids, Barney steps in to demonstrate how each person's unique size holds its own usefulness. When the group heads out to the park, they begin a creative retelling of Jack and the Beanstalk. Barney and his friends discover everyone is special, regardless of size.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children are excited to show Barney all the international flags they are hanging throughout the Caboose, in preparation for the International Fair in the playground later that day. The children learn all about many different countries, including Brazil and Kenya. They learn about the clothing worn by local people, the fascinating animals that live in each land and they also partake in various activities they might join in other countries around the world.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A make-believe neighborhood in the caboose prompts Barney to teach the kids all about different community helpers. The kids explore all the different roles people have in the community that help them live safely and happily, including doctors, police officers, and teachers. The kids realize its great to celebrate the different ways people help others!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Nick announces to the group that he has a workbook assignment for school to fill out, which involves finding as many squares as he can around the park. Barney decided this is a great opportunity for him and the other kids to join in, and its great fun when Barney and the kids can help a friend!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the children have fun playing with toy cars. They take this opportunity to learn about buses and cars, including all the mechanics inside that make them similar. After learning about different kinds of vehicles they may see on the roads, the kids build a bus to take them to their favorite neighborhood spots.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Nick accidentally gets white paint on Sarahs picture, the children must find a way to deal with their emotions. Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry and negative emotions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After an abundance of mail arrives at the Caboose for Barney, the kids realize it must be a very special day. Its Barneys birthday! Barneys friends along with Baby Bop and BJ, put together a stupendous party celebration for him in the park, including decorations and cake galore!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a very special performance for their friends in the park. They all gather in the caboose to prepare for a stupendous night of singing, dancing, and magical fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Sarah and Tony create a beautiful birdhouse to place out in the park. They are happy to learn that the birds will have lots of company; many other animals make their homes in the park too! Barney and the kids travel around the park, noticing and discussing all the various animals that call the park home.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff decides to create a musical zoo when their zoo trip is postponed. Gathering instruments that sound like real animals, Riff gives Barney and his friends a zoo-mazing experience. When Baby Bop hesitates on keeping her promise to watch Ryan's pet frog, Barney tells her the story of The Frog Prince. And Baby Bop learns about keeping her promises.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, she wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel. First, they all make cardboard cars out of some scrap boxes. Next, everyone pretends to be an airplane. Then Barney turns the cardboard airplanes into a great big cardboard bus. They go on a camera safari only to discover the last mode of their transportation--a big cardboard cruise ship.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After noticing parts of the moon are missing in the night sky, Baby Bop is determined to find the rest of it. It's up to Barney and the kids to help Baby Bop take a trip to outer space where they meet Mr. Moon. Baby Bop then learns that the moon is not always full at night.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Daniel fails miserably when he tries to join the others in jump rope. Convinced that he's too little to do anything right, Barney tells him the story of The Sword in the Sandbox. Through the legend of King Arthur, Daniel learns there are many things he can do... if he tries hard enough.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesnt think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try, by recounting the tale of his great-great-grandfather Riffle the Wild West hero!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate to Grace's food drive - put on a movie premiere in the caboose! Barney and friends pitch in to help, but they all have different ideas about what kind of movie to make. Everything they try falls apart. It's curtains for Melanie's movie until she comes up with a blockbuster idea of her own.

programme.title: Surrender on the USS Missouri
programme.desc: On September 2nd, 1945, World War II came to its official end aboard a legendary battleship anchored in Tokyo Bay: the USS Missouri. Some seventy million people had died during the war, but now the fighting would end not with a rifle shot but rather with the swift stroke of a ceremonial pen.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI focuses on the sailors, soldiers, airmen and marines that witnessed the official Japanese surrender. It was one of the most monumental days in history, and only a few witnesses remain.The USS Missouri hadn't been in the fight long, heading into the Pacific theater of war in 1944, but she would become one of the most famous military ships in history when all was said and done. Mighty Mo had been involved in the vicious fight at Iwo Jima and then headed for Okinawa, where she dodged suicidal Kamikaze air attacks during World War II's last great battle. Missouri then bombed Japan before being told to leave the coast for no apparent reason. The reason turned out to be two atomic bombs that were set to be dropped on the cities of Hiroshima and Nagasaki.Through interviews with those who served on the battleship, the film also follows the USS Missouri from its construction, through varied battles in the Pacific, to its final resting place as a memorial and museum in Pearl Harbor.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI features exclusive drone footage of the Missouri, plus never-before-seen photos of the surrender ceremony provided by those who were there. Pacific War historian Daniel Martinez also lends his perspective to the film.

programme.title: Rommel: The Soldier, The Son, and Hitler
programme.desc: ROMMEL: THE SOLDIER, THE SON, AND HITLER provides rare insight into the military career and personal life of Germany's most famous WWII commander, Field Marshal Erwin Rommel. Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. Never a member of the Nazi party, Rommel detested the blending of politics and war. He would quickly discover that both were always in play in Hitler's Germany.Rommel was somewhat nave to Hitler's ways until the latter days of the Afrika Korps defeat in North Africa in 1943. By then, Rommel started to surmise that Germany's fate was sealed. In charge of the famed and flawed Atlantic Wall in western Europe in late 1943, Rommel tried his best to prepare France for the Allied invasion. In the end, it would not be enough. D-Day's success only reinforced Rommel's belief that Adolf Hitler should sue for peace in the west.It was an opinion that Hitler found treasonous.

programme.title: Grandpa's War Story Goes Viral
programme.desc: For Alaskan teenager Henry De Hoop, social media platforms such as Facebook have provided a unique opportunity to share the World War II story of his grandfather, James (Jim) Schmidt, with a global audience. Narrated by Liev Schreiber, GRANDPAS WAR STORY GOES VIRAL shares the remarkable account of Jims World War II service and military career, as well as Henrys efforts to generate interest in his grandfathers war journey and launch a letter-writing campaign on his behalf.Like 16 million others of his generation, Jim responded to the national call to duty following the bombing of Pearl Harbor in 1941. The twist in the story? Jim was only 14 when he enlisted, and the eighth-grade Californian left home without telling his parents. After being wounded in the invasion of Sicily, Jims age was eventually revealed and he was sent home. Not to be deterred, Jim would do stints in both the U.S. Navy and Merchant Marines before finally reaching 18 and officially rejoining the Army. Grandson Henry marveled that Jim joined the war effort at the same age he was when he first shared Jim's story on social media.GRANDPAS WAR JOURNEY GOES VIRAL charts a story of service that began in a movie theater in 1942 where the film Parachute Battalion grabbed a boys attention and ends in the jungles of Vietnam more than two decades later.

programme.title: America's Socialist Experiment
programme.desc: A revealing look at 40 years of socialism in one of Americas conservative cities, Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Between 1910 and 1960, elected socialists including a U.S. Congressman and three mayors reduced corruption, improved conditions for working people, and cleaned up the environment, leaving a mixed legacy to which both Democrats and Republicans lay claim today.

programme.title: Landslide: A Portrait of President Herbert Hoover
programme.desc: Herbert Hoover was a politician and a humanitarian whose legacy has been largely defined by the Great Depression. When he was elected president in a landslide victory in 1928, Hoover had never before held public office. Even so, his humanitarian work and career as a mining engineer, businessman and U.S. Secretary of Commerce carried him to a win. When the stock market crashed on October 29, 1929, Hoovers agenda was derailed by the worsening economic crisis. Despite various efforts to pull the nation out of depression, Hoovers unsuccessful attempts led to his sound defeat by Franklin Roosevelt just four years after his landslide victory. LANDSLIDE looks at the life of the controversial figure through interviews with notable historians and Hoover scholars.The program explores the facts and fictions behind the presidency of Herbert Hoover including The Great Depression and the role of the Federal Reserve. Hoovers early life in Iowa and abroad, the international experiences that led to his decision to run for office, his presidency and political philosophy, and the lasting impacts of his policy decisions during and after the depression are revealed. Through interviews with notable scholars such as David Kennedy, Amity Shlaes, Robert Reich, Tim Egan and Timothy Walch, this biography sheds new light on Hoovers difficult tenure and enduring legacy.

programme.title: Uncle Jack: The Manhattan Project and Beyond
programme.desc: The Manhattan Project was an enormous undertaking that required the efforts of many of the world's most brilliant intellectuals. Hundreds of physicists, mathematicians, and engineers were needed to design, build, and test the world's first atomic weapon and the Unites States government did everything in its power to lure these individuals to the Manhattan Project. Documentary includes: Interviews with Scientists conducted by the World War II Foundation Interviews with World War II Historians, Interviews with WWII veterans Interviews with those who worked with John Gray in the world of Atomic Energy, Interviews with authors who have written extensively about the Manhattan Project, Interviews with people from the world of academia. This film is personal: One of those assigned to the project was my uncle John Edmund Gray, a University of Rhode Island graduate with a brilliant mind.Tim Gray
